title: Platform Subtree Zero-Frontier Handoff Demotion
objective: Normalize the parent-root platform-subtree zero-frontier handoff so it no longer presents itself as an active subtree checkpoint after standalone repo cutover and instead acts as historical provenance with explicit current operator routing.
dependency_note: After Packet 107 demoted the handoff register README, the strongest adjacent current-looking individual handoff was the parent-root platform-subtree zero-frontier handoff. Its scope and verification section still identified it as an active checkpoint even though the standalone repo boundary now owns live routing.
execution_scope: Retitle the platform-subtree zero-frontier handoff as historical provenance.
Add a historical note and explicit current operator routing.
Relabel the current-state section as historical verified state without rewriting the rest of the handoff body.
forbidden_scope: broad handoff-archive rewriting beyond top-of-file demotion and heading normalization
success_criteria: The platform-subtree zero-frontier handoff now reads as historical provenance instead of an active subtree checkpoint.
The file explicitly routes current readers to the standalone repo roots.
Repo-owned status routing records the closure and keeps the next lane on remaining individual handoff records and packet-history index surfaces.
validation_commands: Select-String -Path ops/agents/handoffs/2026-04-22-parent-root-platform-subtree-zero-frontier-handoff.md -Pattern '^# Historical Parent-Root Platform-Subtree Zero-Frontier Handoff$','^## Scope: Historical zero-frontier checkpoint','^Historical note: this handoff records the parent-root subtree publication state before the canonical repo boundary moved to `C:/APEX Platform/apex-power-ops-platform` on 2026-05-07\..*','^Current operator note:$','^## 2\. Historical Verified State$'
Select-String -Path ops/agents/handoffs/2026-04-22-parent-root-platform-subtree-zero-frontier-handoff.md -Pattern '^## 2\. Current Verified State$','^## Scope: Active zero-frontier checkpoint'
next_action: Return repo-foundation routing to the remaining individual historical handoff files and packet-history index surfaces that still look current at the top of the file.
